# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud compute security.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
- name: vm-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/n1-standard-1

    # Use a dedicated service account with minimal permissions instead of default
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: {{ properties["serviceAccountEmail"] }}
      scopes:
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform

    disks:
    - deviceName: boot-disk
      type: PERSISTENT
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-11
        diskSizeGb: 20
        diskType: zones/us-central1-a/diskTypes/pd-ssd
        # Use Customer-Managed Encryption Keys (CMEK) instead of default encryption
        diskEncryptionKey:
          kmsKeyName: {{ properties["kmsKeyName"] }}

    networkInterfaces:
    - network: {{ properties["networkSelfLink"] }}
      subnetwork: {{ properties["subnetworkSelfLink"] }}
      # No external IP - use Cloud NAT or IAP for access
      # accessConfigs are intentionally omitted to prevent public IP assignment

    # Enable Shielded VM features for boot integrity
    shieldedInstanceConfig:
      enableSecureBoot: true
      enableVtpm: true
      enableIntegrityMonitoring: true

    # Restrict metadata access
    metadata:
      items:
      - key: block-project-ssh-keys
        value: "true"
      - key: enable-oslogin
        value: "true"
      - key: serial-port-enable
        value: "false"

    # Apply labels for governance and tracking
    labels:
      environment: {{ properties["environment"] }}
      managed-by: deployment-manager
      data-classification: {{ properties["dataClassification"] }}

    tags:
      items:
      - no-public-ingress
      - allow-iap-ssh

    # Disable IP forwarding unless explicitly needed
    canIpForward: false

    # Set deletion protection for production workloads
    deletionProtection: {{ properties["deletionProtection"] }}

# Firewall rule to allow SSH only via IAP
- name: allow-iap-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: {{ properties["networkSelfLink"] }}
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    sourceRanges:
    - 35.235.240.0/20  # IAP's IP range
    targetTags:
    - allow-iap-ssh
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: TCP
      ports:
      - "22"

# Deny all other ingress by default
- name: deny-all-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: {{ properties["networkSelfLink"] }}
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 65534
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    targetTags:
    - no-public-ingress
    denied:
    - IPProtocol: ALL
